nodes.title: CAR structure mismatch - records stored in MST not CAR format
nodes.description: The backfill worker uses CARReader which reads blocks from CAR archive. But PDS stores records in MST (Merkle Search Tree), which is a different structure. nodes.description: Reviewed all 9 harnesses + standalone_driver.cpp. Identified 10 concrete issues: 4 critical (MST discarded results, DB state persistence, lexicon loading, DPoP crypto bypass), 5 high-priority (HTTP error path, JWT verifier missing, MIME type hardcoded, CBOR offset variant, non-recursive walk), 3 lower-priority (touch fields, parameterized queries, chunk feeding).

nodes.title: C1: FuzzMST - Return Values Assigned & Traversed

nodes.title: C2: FuzzPDSDatabase - State Isolation via SAVEPOINT
nodes.description: Fixed persistent DB state that survived across iterations. Now wrap each SQL execution in SAVEPOINT fuzz / ROLLBACK TO SAVEPOINT fuzz, isolating each fuzzer input. Added explicit null checks for gFuzzDatabase.

nodes.title: C3: FuzzATProtoLexiconValidator - Lexicon Loading Fix
nodes.description: Fixed lexicon path: NSBundle mainBundle returns nil in CLI binary. Now loads from cwd-relative Lexicons/ directory. Switched to ATProtoValidationModeRequired (was Optimistic) and added multi-collection testing.

nodes.title: C4: FuzzDPoP - Crypto Verification + JWT Parsing
nodes.description: Added platform guard (#if __APPLE__). Now also parses DPoP proof as JWT (proof is just a JWT). Added verifyDPoP with different method/uri variations. Exercises JWT header/payload extraction path within DPoP verifier.

nodes.title: H1: FuzzHttp1Parser - Error Path + Chunk Feeding
nodes.description: Added [parser parseError] method call to exercise error-path state machine. Added chunk feeding test: split input in half, feed separately via two feedData: calls, tests incremental parsing. Checks parser.state machine progression.

nodes.title: H2: FuzzJWT - JWTVerifier + Base64URLDecode
nodes.description: Added JWTVerifier claims validation with expectedIssuer, expectedAudience, allowedAlgorithms. Reads all payload fields (iss, sub, aud, exp, iat, nbf, jti, did). Added base64URLDecode calls. Tests security-critical verification path and encoding utilities.

nodes.title: H3: FuzzMimeTypeValidator - Fuzz-Driven MIME Type
nodes.description: Fixed hardcoded forMimeType (@image/jpeg) — now uses fuzz-derived mimeType. Added isSupportedMimeType and sniffMimeTypeFromData calls. Tests multiple MIME types (png, gif, webp, mp4, pdf, etc.) against magic numbers.

nodes.title: H4: FuzzCBORDecoder - Offset-Based Decode
nodes.description: Added [CBORDecoder decode:input offset:&offset] call alongside simple decode. Tests streaming/multi-value decoding path with different offset boundary conditions. Touches type and all value accessors (simpleValue, floatValue, etc.).

nodes.title: H5: standalone_driver.cpp - Recursive Walk + DT_UNKNOWN Fallback
nodes.description: Changed non-recursive corpus walk to recursive directory traversal. Added DT_UNKNOWN handling: falls back to stat() when dirent.d_type is unknown (Linux filesystems). Now processes corpus subdirectories. Filters dot dirs to skip . and ..

nodes.title: L1-L3: Lower-Priority Improvements
